name: EPR PROPERTIES
summary: PART I General EPR Properties (we, us, our, EPR or the Company) was formed on August22,1997 as a self-administered Maryland real estate investment trust (REIT), and an initial public offering of our common shares of beneficial interest (common shares) was completed on November18, 1997. Since that time, we have been a leading net lease investor in experiential real estate, venues that create value by facilitating out-of-home leisure and recreation experiences where consumers choose to spend their...
